name: VAIBot Circuit Breaker v2
description: OpenClaw Gateway plugin that enforces VAIBot governance decisions with a circuit-breaker fallback.

guardBaseUrl.description: Local vaibot-guard service URL (skill). Primary decision source.

mcpBaseUrl.description: VAIBot MCP HTTP endpoint (fallback after guard).

mcpTokenEnv.description: Env var containing Bearer token for MCP endpoint.

apiBaseUrl.description: VAIBot API base URL (fallback decision source).

apiKeyEnv.description: Env var that contains the VAIBOT API key (fallback decision source).

dashboardUrl.description: VAIBot dashboard base URL. Used to build claim links on auto-bootstrap and claim-nudge messages.

autoBootstrap.description: On first run without an API key, auto-provision a free-tier account via POST /v2/bootstrap and save credentials to credsDir/credentials.json.

credsDir.description: Directory for credentials.json (shared with other VAIBot plugins). Defaults to $HOME/.vaibot, or $VAIBOT_CREDS_DIR if set.

agent.description: Agent identifier sent on bootstrap and recorded on decide receipts.

decisionChain.description: Decision sources in order. 'skill' is an alias for 'guard'.
